name: Roast Turkey Breast with Rosemary and Garlic
recipeIngredient: Skinless turkey breast, bone in, about 3 lbs
1/2 tsp dried rosemary OR tiny sprigs fresh rosemary
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim any excess fat from the turkey breast.
2. Make small slits in the top of the breast and insert garlic slivers and rosemary sprigs (or dried rosemary if fresh is unavailable).
3. In a small bowl, combine honey, Dijon mustard, olive oil, lemon juice, and pepper. Stir until well mixed.
4. Brush the mixture evenly over the turkey breast, then sprinkle with salt to taste.
5. Place the turkey in a baking dish, meaty side up. Roast at 350°F for 45 to 60 minutes, or until fully cooked. Baste every 10 to 15 minutes.
6. To carve, slice the meat off the bone on a diagonal.
